steps.observed: Dashboard loaded with 451 experiments in All view

steps.action: Open era dropdown and select memories_500
steps.observed: Only exp_NNNN experiments shown, count: 358

steps.action: Verify no exp_lme_NNNN visible on page 1
steps.observed: 0 exp_lme experiments in 50 visible rows
358 exactly

assertions.title: Era Filtering — LongMemEval

steps.action: Open era dropdown and select LongMemEval
steps.observed: Only exp_lme_NNNN experiments shown, count: 93
0 exp_NNNN experiments in 50 visible rows
93 (filesystem has 94 exp_lme_* dirs, dashboard shows 93)

assertions.issues: Count discrepancy: validation contract says ~78, user-testing.md says 78, but filesystem has 94 dirs and dashboard shows 93. The assertion passes because the filtering is correct (only exp_lme_* shown), but the expected count is outdated.

steps.action: Open era dropdown and select All
steps.observed: Both exp_lme_* and exp_NNNN visible in same table

steps.action: Verify both ID formats present on page 1
steps.observed: First 6 rows: exp_lme_0077, exp_lme_0076, exp_lme_0068, exp_lme_0075, exp_lme_0008, exp_lme_0073, then exp_0147 etc.
451 total (358 memories_500 + 93 LongMemEval)

assertions.title: Status Filtering

steps.observed: 10 statuses: accepted_cv, baseline, completed, improved, no_results, not_improved, recorded, rejected, rejected_cv, validation_failed
3 results, all with status 'improved'

steps.expected: Both improved and not_improved visible (OR logic)
steps.observed: 56 results with both statuses (3 improved + 53 not_improved)
451 experiments restored, button text reset to 'Filter by status...'

assertions.issues: Minor UX friction: clicking the option element closes the dropdown instead of toggling the checkbox. Multi-select requires programmatic checkbox click (JS click on input). This may be a dash-ag-grid VirtualizedSelect behavior.

assertions.title: Status Display — Distinct Visual Indicators

steps.action: View experiment table with multiple statuses visible
steps.expected: Each status has unique visual treatment (color, icon, badge)
steps.observed: All status values rendered as plain text with no background color, no border radius, no different text color, no icons

steps.action: Inspect computed styles of status cells
steps.observed: All status cells: backgroundColor=transparent, color=rgb(24,29,31), fontWeight=400, borderRadius=0px
Sidebar legend correctly shows 11 colored indicators with proper STATUS_COLORS mapping

assertions.issues: The AG Grid cellStyle function-based callback is not being applied. The column definition uses `{"function": "..."}` format for cellStyle (line 227 of app.py), but dash-ag-grid 33.3.3 does not execute this as a callback. Plain object cellStyle (e.g., on hypothesis column) works fine. The sidebar status legend (HTML-based) renders colors correctly. Root cause: cellStyle function syntax incompatible with dash-ag-grid.

assertions.title: Status Color Coding Consistent

steps.action: Compare table badge colors with filter control colors
steps.expected: Same color values used in both locations
steps.observed: Table status cells have no color at all (transparent bg, default text color). Sidebar legend shows correct colors. Status filter dropdown has no color indicators.

steps.action: Verify colors preserved after sort/filter operations
steps.observed: N/A — no colors to preserve in table cells

assertions.issues: Same root cause as VAL-TABLE-007: cellStyle function not executing in dash-ag-grid. The STATUS_COLORS dict defines correct color mappings used in the sidebar legend, but the AG Grid column cellStyle callback fails to apply them to table cells.

steps.expected: Experiments matching ID or hypothesis shown
steps.observed: 8 results: exp_lme_0008 (ID match) + 7 others referencing exp_lme_0008 in hypothesis
48 results, all with 'sigmoid' in hypothesis text, none in IDs

steps.expected: AND logic: only LongMemEval experiments matching search
steps.observed: 8 results, all exp_lme_*, same set as All era (all references are in LME era)

steps.expected: 0 results (AND logic, no memories_500 references exp_lme_0008)
steps.observed: 0 results — correctly shows empty table

frictions.description: Status filter multi-select via agent-browser click on option element closes the dropdown instead of toggling the checkbox. Required using JavaScript click on the checkbox input directly.
frictions.resolution: Used agent-browser eval to programmatically click the checkbox input element

frictions.description: Validation contract expected ~78 LongMemEval experiments but actual filesystem has 94 directories (dashboard shows 93). The user-testing.md count (78) appears outdated.
frictions.resolution: Noted the discrepancy; assertion passes on filtering correctness (all exp_lme_* shown) rather than exact count

summary: Tested 7 assertions: 5 passed, 2 failed. VAL-TABLE-007 and VAL-TABLE-008 fail due to AG Grid cellStyle function-based callback not executing in dash-ag-grid 33.3.3 — status badges in the table render as plain text without color/icon styling. The sidebar legend renders colors correctly. Era filtering (VAL-TABLE-001/002/003), status filtering (VAL-TABLE-004), and search (VAL-TABLE-020) all work correctly.
